data.body: Root cause confirmed: run_case dispatched only criterion ids, code-review prompt ids, and the 3 agentic reviewers; 'plan-review-novelty' additionally would have been mangled by _criterion_id (prefix-stripped to 'novelty', a nonexistent criterion). Fix: added _run_novelty_case in src/rebar/llm/evals/eval_solver.py — an exact-id dispatch arm checked BEFORE the criterion arm — routing each labeled {carryover,novel} case's finding/prior_finding pair through the same score_novelty kernel path the Pass-3 rising floor uses (RunRequest wiring mirrors plan_review._score_floor_novelty: output_schema plan_review_novelty, single_turn), returning {'novelty': float} which the discriminates_novelty scorer reads. Offline FakeRunner tests added in tests/unit/test_eval_solver.py (novel->1.0, carryover->0.0, both score PASS).
